recommendations.title: Capricorn One
recommendations.overview: In order to protect the reputation of the American space program, a team of NASA administrators turn the first Mars mission into a phony Mars landing. Under threat of harm to their families the astronauts play their part in the deception on a staged

recommendations.title: Europa Report
recommendations.overview: A crew of international astronauts are sent on a private mission to Jupiter's fourth moon.

recommendations.title: Sunshine
recommendations.overview: Fifty years into the future, the sun is dying, and Earth is threatened by arctic temperatures. A team of astronauts is sent to revive the Sun — but the mission fails. Seven years later, a new team is sent to finish the mission as mankind’s last hope.

recommendations.title: Stowaway
recommendations.overview: A three-person crew on a mission to Mars faces an impossible choice when an unplanned passenger jeopardizes the lives of everyone on board.

recommendations.title: 400 Days
recommendations.overview: 4 would be astronauts spend 400 days in a land locked space simulator to test the psychological effects of deep space travel but, when something goes terribly wrong and they are forced to leave the simulation, they discover that everything on earth h

recommendations.title: Clara
recommendations.overview: An astronomer becomes obsessed with searching the cosmos for signs of life beyond Earth which leads to a shocking discovery.

recommendations.title: 2036 Origin Unknown
recommendations.overview: After the first manned mission to Mars ends in a deadly crash, mission controller Mackenzie 'Mack' Wilson assists an artificial intelligence system, A.R.T.I. Their investigation uncovers a mysterious object under the surface of Mars that could change

recommendations.title: Welcome to the Jungle
recommendations.overview: A company retreat on a tropical island goes terribly awry.

recommendations.title: The Beyond
recommendations.overview: Set in 2019, The Beyond chronicles the groundbreaking mission which sent astronauts - modified with advanced robotics, through a newly discovered wormhole known as the Void. When the mission returns unexpectedly, the space agency races to discover wh

recommendations.title: Approaching the Unknown
recommendations.overview: Captain William Stanaforth is on a one-way solo mission to take the first steps in colonising Mars. Like all pioneers throughout history, Stanaforth will face insurmountable odds and life and death decisions as he rockets bravely through space.
